channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sharks trade 2028 draft pick to Penguins for veteran defenseman
item.description: San Jose Sharks acquire Vincent Desharnais from Pittsburgh Penguins for a 2028 fifth-round draft pick
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Bodybuilder Jodi Vance was 'throwing up all morning' before dying of heart attack, 911 audio reveals
item.description: Jodi Vance's wife said in a 911 call the 20-year-old bodybuilder was "throwing up all morning" before becoming unconscious and dying of a heart attack brought on by dehydration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: St. Thomas is rising with rare D3-D1 jump. NCAA postseason ban makes Summit tourney the present peak
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — One of the highest-scoring teams in the country has 22 wins, the No. 2 seed for its conference tournament — and no place to play after that. For the University of St. Thomas, the accelerated transition to full-fledged NCAA Division I member is almost over.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Riley Gaines wants to send a 'thank-you note' to Lia Thomas; here's why
item.description: Riley Gaines told Fox News Digital she would send a 'thank-you note' to Lia Thomas three years after their infamous tie and has even tried reaching out.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SF Giants’ Harrison rocked in second outing of spring training
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. — Kyle Harrison entered spring training as the on-paper favorite to win the fifth spot in the San Francisco Giants’ starting rotation. He may very well still be the favorite given he pitched the second-most innings for the Giants last season.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Devils star Jack Hughes out for season following hard crash into boards
item.description: New Jersey Devils star Jack Hughes underwent shoulder surgery on Wednesday following an ugly hit and is now out for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jai Lucas, Miami finalize agreement to make him Hurricanes' coach, AP source says
item.description: Jai Lucas and Miami have finalized the contract that makes him the school's new men's basketball coach, nearly two weeks after they struck preliminary agreement on a deal, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Raiders give pass rusher Maxx Crosby record-breaking extension
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — The Raiders not only extended the contract of star defensive end Maxx Crosby, they made him the highest-paid non quarterback in NFL history.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU wins double-overtime thriller over #10 Iowa State
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points and No. 23 BYU outlasted No. 10 Iowa State 88-85 in double overtime Tuesday night for its seventh consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes lose home finale to West Virginia, 71-69
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Senior Night did not go the way the Utes basketball hoped. Javon Small scored 18 points to help West Virginia beat its former coach Josh Eilert and Utah 71-69 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Baseball: Santa Fe Christian 3. Valhalla 2
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Baseball first game of the season for Santa Fe Christian who won a low scoring game against Valhalla 3-2. Eagles were paced by sophomore Kyle Plasman, young man was on a good one out the gate, 3 for 4 with three doubles. A fantastic pitching performance by senior Kam Lohse.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Foul! Cavaliers guard Ty Jerome blasts officials after whistle-happy crew calls 53 fouls
item.description: Upset with an inordinate number of personals called during Cleveland's 133-129 overtime win against Portland on Sunday, Jerome didn't hold back in criticizing the officiating crew — zeroing in on referee Natalie Sago.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Donato scores twice, Blackhawks snap 5-game skid with 6-3 road win over Ducks
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Ryan Donato had two goals and an assist, and the Blackhawks ended a five-game losing streak with a 6-3 road victory over the Anaheim Ducks on Saturday night. Teuvo Teravainen had a goal and two assists and Lukas Reichel, Wyatt Kaiser and Patrick Marron also scored.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: New Jersey cools off Utah HC, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The New Jersey Devils scored twice in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-1 at Delta Center on Saturday, ending Utah's three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Avalanche land Lindgren, Wild get Nyquist and Panthers acquire Seth Jones in busy day of NHL trades
item.description: Defensemen Seth Jones and Ryan Lindgren and forward Gustav Nyquist were on the move on Saturday as three Central Division teams got a jump on the NHL’s looming trade deadline.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Commanders acquire wide receiver Deebo Samuel in a trade with the 49ers, AP source says
item.description: The Washington Commanders have acquired wide receiver Deebo Samuel from the San Francisco 49ers for a fifth-round pick, pending a physical, according to a person with knowledge of the trade.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5
